Off Calendar May-13-2013 Continued To May-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Off Calendar

Petition For Preliminary Distribution And Allowance Of Fees
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Michael Shuttleworth to appear on June 13, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. Status on said petition was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Upon further reveiw, the Court found that a Petition for Preliminary Distribution was filed on May 4, 2012. The matter will be taken off calendar and the Order to Appear will not be issued.
